text.title: SaaS Stack Audit Decision Tree
text.summary: Per-tool tree mapping (last_login_days, tied_to_revenue, duplicate_of, seat_utilisation) to one of 5 buckets.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — stack too small; overhead exceeds value
consolidate or cancel: keep the one tied_to_revenue; reject parallel tools
cancel: no revenue tie + no recent login = no defensible reason to keep
suspend: no revenue tie but recent use; pause until next quarter; force re-justification
downgrade_seat: tied to revenue but over-provisioned; downgrade to lower tier
keep: revenue tie + active utilisation; document evidence + signed by founder

text.example: inventory=5+ → duplicate_of=linear → consolidate/cancel → cancel (linear is primary).
